translation: def addEdge(self, head: Set[V], e: Any, tail: Set[V]) -> None:
self.checkGraphCondition(head is not None, "Null head Vertex not admitted")
self.checkGraphCondition(e is not None, "Impossible to add a null Edge in the Graph")
self.checkGraphCondition(tail is not None, "Null tail Vertex not admitted")
self.checkGraphCondition(self.containsVertex(head), f"Head Vertex '{head}' not present in the Graph")
self.checkGraphCondition(self.containsVertex(tail), f"Tail Vertex '{tail}' not present in the Graph")
self.checkGraphCondition(self.getEdge(head, tail) is None, f"Edge {e} is already present in the Graph")
